mapper.select:
SELECT ID, RULE_NAME, EMPTY_WEIGHT, HEAVY_WEIGHT, IS_DEFAULT, TRANSPORT_TYPE, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME FROM M_WEIGHT_RULES
id = #{id}
SELECT ID, RULE_NAME, EMPTY_WEIGHT, HEAVY_WEIGHT, IS_DEFAULT, TRANSPORT_TYPE, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME FROM M_WEIGHT_RULES
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_WEIGHT_RULES( ID, RULE_NAME, EMPTY_WEIGHT, HEAVY_WEIGHT, IS_DEFAULT, TRANSPORT_TYPE, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ruleName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emptyWeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{heavyWeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isDefault, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transportType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_WEIGHT_RULES SET RULE_NAME = #{ruleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMPTY_WEIGHT = #{emptyWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, HEAVY_WEIGHT = #{heavyWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, IS_DEFAULT = #{isDefault,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRANSPORT_TYPE = #{transportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
